---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## User Story
As a **[type of user]**, I want **[goal]** so that **[benefit]**.

*Example: As a Qubic developer, I want AST-based analysis so that interprocedural vulnerabilities are detected.*

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? What is currently missing or painful?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've considered?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Any mockups, references, or related issues?
